channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
### Fixed
- **Correct pairing detection** — v1.3.0 tried to detect pairing by catching WebSocket close code 1008 at Step 1 (challenge receive), but the gateway actually sends the error as a proper JSON response (`NOT_PAIRED`) at Step 4 (connect response). Apple's `URLSessionWebSocketTask` doesn't reliably expose close codes, making the old approach hit-or-miss. Now checks the structured error response instead.
- **Connection wizard handles pairing** — auto-detect, manual, and advanced probe flows all properly detect pairing errors and show the pairing sheet instead of falling through to "connection failed"
- **Profile auto-saved on pairing** — if pairing is triggered during first-time setup (no profile saved yet), the gateway profile is created automatically before reconnecting
- **Version display** — MARKETING_VERSION now correctly set to 1.3.1 in Xcode project

### Improved
- **Auto-polling pairing sheet** — after opening the Control UI in the browser, ClawDeck polls the gateway every 3 seconds. When pairing is approved, it reconnects automatically — no manual "Retry" click needed.
- Pairing timeout extended to 2 minutes with clear status messages

### Added
- `NOT_PAIRED` gateway error code in protocol constants
- `ConnectErrorDetailCode` enum for structured connect error handling

---
**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1
